name: softaims-boilerplate
description: softaims internal plugin marketplace — each skill from the claude-code-boilerplate repo wrapped as a standalone, installable plugin.

plugins.name: generate-docs
plugins.description: Analyzes recent git changes or specific files to write feature documentation under docs/features/.

plugins.name: git-push
plugins.description: Reviews staged files, writes a Conventional Commit message, confirms with you, then commits and pushes only what is staged.

plugins.name: null-safety-scan
plugins.description: Strict null/undefined/None safety audit on staged TS/JS/Python files.

plugins.name: pr-open
plugins.description: Opens a GitHub PR from the current branch — auto-fills title, summary, and test-plan checklist from the diff.

plugins.name: pre-merge-check
plugins.description: Runs lint + typecheck + tests in parallel and blocks on failure (TS/JS + Python).

plugins.name: react-native-optimization-and-architecture
plugins.description: React Native + Expo performance and architecture best practices.

plugins.name: security-audit
plugins.description: 42-rule OWASP Top 10 gate + single-rule deep-dives + API mask audit + full pen-test report. Output masked, paper-trail in docs/security/.

plugins.name: security-scan
plugins.description: Scans staged diff for hardcoded secrets and known-vulnerable dependencies.

plugins.name: system-design
plugins.description: End-to-end design auditor across React Native client, NestJS backend, and Python AI service.

plugins.name: team-pulse
plugins.description: Aggregates daily/weekly team activity (commits, PRs, reviews) into a markdown digest under docs/team-pulse/.

plugins.name: pentesting
plugins.description: Adversarial red-team pen-tester. Open-ended attack-surface analysis. Dispatches parallel recon agents, writes a structured red-team report, optionally applies fixes.

plugins.name: feature-review
plugins.description: Team-lead-grade evaluator for a feature shipped by another engineer. Produces a merge verdict grounded in a regression-risk map, approach critique, better-approach proposals, and a specific test-plan gap list.

plugins.name: contract-drift-check
plugins.description: Detects schema drift across the three workspaces of this monorepo. Enforces the CLAUDE.md rule 'type contracts at boundaries'.

plugins.name: dependency-hygiene
plugins.description: Audits third-party deps for unused packages, duplicate versions, peer-dep conflicts, license drift, and outdated critical libraries (TS/JS + Python).

plugins.name: test-coverage-delta
plugins.description: Runs coverage against the base branch and reports only the newly-added uncovered lines (jest / vitest / pytest-cov).

plugins.name: complexity-check
plugins.description: Enforces per-function and per-file complexity ceilings — cyclomatic, cognitive, function length, file length, params, nesting depth.

plugins.name: migration-safety
plugins.description: Audits DB migrations (Prisma / TypeORM / Knex / Alembic / raw SQL) for production-time hazards — irreversible drops, backfills under concurrent writes, long-locking index builds.

plugins.name: adr-writer
plugins.description: Guided Architecture Decision Record writer. Enforces context / decision / consequences / alternatives on one page under docs/adr/NNNN-<slug>.md.

plugins.name: perf-budget
plugins.description: Tracks and enforces performance budgets over time — bundle size, API p95, RN startup / JS-thread time. Baselines under docs/perf/baseline.json.

plugins.name: dead-code-scan
plugins.description: Finds unused exports, unreachable branches, and orphan files (TS/JS + Python). Complementary to dependency-hygiene.

plugins.name: api-mock-parity
plugins.description: Keeps client mock fixtures (MSW / Storybook / JSON) in sync with backend OpenAPI / DTOs / pydantic schemas.

plugins.name: feature-audit
plugins.description: One-command evening feature auditor. Fans out to every relevant review skill in parallel and synthesizes ONE report with ONE merge verdict. The lead's nightly ritual.
